code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut lens: List<Int> = []
mut counts: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
mut tok_start = -1

while i <= n
  mut at_boundary = false
  if i == n
    at_boundary = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws_byte(b)
        at_boundary = true
      end
    when None
      at_boundary = true
    end
  end

  if at_boundary
    if tok_start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, tok_start, i)
      mut found = -1
      mut k = 0
      let nk = list.len(starts)
      while k < nk
        let s = starts[k]
        let l = lens[k]
        let existing = string.substring(input, s, s + l)
        if existing == tok
          found = k
          k = nk
        else
          k = k + 1
        end
      end
      if found >= 0
        mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
        mut j = 0
        let nc = list.len(counts)
        while j < nc
          let c = counts[j]
          if j == found
            new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c + 1)
          else
            new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c)
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
        counts = new_counts
      else
        starts = list.push(starts, tok_start)
        lens = list.push(lens, i - tok_start)
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      end
      tok_start = -1
    end
  else
    if tok_start < 0
      tok_start = i
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut best_idx = 0
mut best_count = 0
mut p = 0
let np = list.len(counts)
while p < np
  let c = counts[p]
  if c > best_count
    best_count = c
    best_idx = p
  end
  p = p + 1
end

if np > 0
  let s = starts[best_idx]
  let l = lens[best_idx]
  let tok = string.substring(input, s, s + l)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
